name: projection-mapper-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the Projection Mapper desktop app, mobile companion app and shared packages

scripts.build: npm run build -w @projection-mapper/shared && npm run build -w @projection-mapper/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @projection-mapper/shared && npm run test -w @projection-mapper/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @projection-mapper/desktop && npm run lint -w @projection-mapper/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @projection-mapper/shared && npm run typecheck -w @projection-mapper/desktop && npm run typecheck -w @projection-mapper/mobile
